quotes.text: The best time to add analytics is on day one. The second best time is when you realize you've been flying blind for 6 months.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Feature requests are just customers telling you what they think they want. Usage data tells you what they actually want.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Marketing without data is driving with your eyes closed. Data without marketing is having your eyes open but going nowhere.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Without data, you're just another person with an opinion.
quotes.author: W. Edwards Deming

quotes.text: Data is the new oil. But like oil, it's useless until you refine it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to make decisions is with data. The second best is with experience. The worst is with hunches.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your data pipeline is only as good as its weakest transformation. Garbage in, garbage out.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: A/B testing takes courage. The courage to let go of your favorite idea when the data says otherwise.
quotes.author: based
